en-US.name: Carehub - Medical Transport
en-US.subtitle: NEMT Rides Made Easy
en-US.shortDescription: Book medical rides instantly. NEMT transportation made easy.
en-US.fullDescription:
Carehub connects patients with reliable non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) services. Whether you need a ride to a doctor's appointment, dialysis treatment, or physical therapy session, Carehub makes booking easy and stress-free.

Features:
• Book rides instantly or schedule in advance
• Real-time driver tracking and ETAs
• Secure in-app messaging with your driver
• Wheelchair, stretcher, and mobility assistance options
• Vehicle type selection (Sedan, SUV, Wheelchair Van, Stretcher Van, Minivan)
• Insurance billing support
• 24/7 customer support

NEW - Caregiver/Family Portal:
• Manage rides for loved ones from one dashboard
• Add and track multiple patients
• Quick booking with pre-filled patient info
• View ride history across all managed patients

NEW - Facility Discharge Coordination:
• Hospital and clinic staff can book patient transport
• Discharge and appointment transport presets
• Facility address auto-fills for fast booking
• Track all facility rides in one place

For Healthcare Workers:
• Find healthcare staffing opportunities
• Apply for positions at top facilities
• Manage your schedule and availability

For Drivers:
• Accept ride requests in your area
• Navigate with integrated maps
• Track your earnings and tips
• Wait time tracking at appointments
• Surge zone demand map

Download Carehub today for reliable medical transportation!
en-US.keywords: medical transport,NEMT,healthcare ride,doctor appointment,medical taxi,wheelchair transport,dialysis transport,healthcare staffing,caregiver,discharge,hospital transport
en-US.whatsNew:
Version 1.2.0 Updates:
• NEW Caregiver/Family Portal - Manage rides for loved ones from one dashboard
• NEW Facility Discharge Coordination - Hospital staff can book patient transport
• Vehicle type selection - Choose Sedan, SUV, Wheelchair Van, Stretcher Van, or Minivan
• Wait time tracking at appointments ($0.50/min after 15-min free grace)
• Surge zone map for drivers with color-coded demand zones
• Enhanced driver dashboard with compliance enforcement
• Legal compliance - Terms of Service, IC Agreement with digital signatures
• Audit logging for sensitive healthcare actions
• Improved security with ride ownership verification

ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Carehub needs your location to show nearby rides and navigate to pickup/dropoff locations.
ios.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Carehub needs your location in the background to track rides and provide accurate ETAs.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: Carehub needs camera access to capture documents for driver verification.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Carehub needs photo library access to upload documents.
